title: let_me_free.jar
description: A psychological horror mod that adds horrifying entities, RNG events, jumpscares, unexpected teleportation and an unsettling atmosphere to your Minecraft world.
body:
# Hey, y'all. I'm sure you guys noticed there's no updates... well, I got demotivated working on this mod. After the revamp update, i got demotivated more, and more. Don't get me wrong - this mod will continue to have updates, but in future. For now, i'll take a break and focus on my life. Thank you for understanding 
# ⚠️ FabricAPI REQUIRED ⚠️
## Alpha Version: This mod is still in early development and will receive major improvements, new features, and fixes over time.

**let_me_free.jar** transforms Minecraft into a psychological horror experience filled with paranoia, tension, and unexpected encounters.
**For best experience play in singleplayer**

Instead of traditional gameplay additions, this mod focuses on atmosphere, fear, and disturbing events that make players feel watched and unsafe.

## Features:
### PC Interactions

- Opens Terminal
- Shut down
- Getting country/pc name/WiFi IP

### Entities

- Stalking - unexpected encounters with entities appearing out of nowhere
- Chase - running from entities for your life

### Dimensions

- Teleporting to other dimensions out of nowhere, or interaction with a portal

### Psychological Horror Events

- Random disturbing messages
- Visual overlays and hallucinations
- Camera effects and jumpscares

### Atmospheric Effects

- Unsettling sounds
- Paranormal occurrences

## Intended Experience

This mod is designed to make players feel **uneasy and constantly alert**. Events are unpredictable, ensuring no playthrough feels safe.

If you enjoy psychological horror and tension rather than traditional combat mods, this is for you.

## Compatibility

- **FabricAPI required**
- For best experience play in **singleplayer**. Works for multiplayer, too.

## Inspiration
- This mod was inspirated from The Broken Script and wonderland.jar.

Enter your world… and see if something is already watching you.
